word: G1606 - ἐκπνέω - ekpnéō - ek-pneh'-o - Give up the ghost

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκπνέω

- Transliteration: Ekpneo

- Phonetic: ek-pneh'-o

- Definition:

1. to breathe out, breathe out one's life, breathe one's last, expire

- Origin: from G1537 and G4154

- TDNT entry: 13:32,9

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G4154; to expire: - give up the ghost.
